component.name: Floating Action Button
component.description: Brand-primary elevated control for global actions. Icon-only (circular) opens the quick-add bottom sheet; extended pill opens the new-job flow (navigation handled by the app, not this component).

plusIconReference.note: Same plus geometry as Section Header ADD control; implement with `PlusIcon`.

elevation.figmaDropShadow: Single drop shadow: offset y=2, blur 6, brand tint ~16% opacity (replaces previous stacked heavy shadows).

codeProps.label: optional; extended only, e.g. New Job
codeProps.onClick: handler; parent decides bottom sheet vs navigation
codeProps.ariaLabel: required meaningful name for icon-only; extended can default from label
